articles.title: Pope Leo XIV says ‘not in my interest at all’ to debate Trump but will keep preaching peace
articles.description:
Leo spoke to reporters aboard the papal plane flying from Cameroon to Angola as part of his 11-day tour of Africa.

articles.title: Police identify woman who claimed she had been kidnapped, say she is not in danger
articles.description:
Abington police had initially asked for the public’s help in identifying the woman, who appeared on a Ring camera early Tuesday, saying she’d been kidnapped.
